name: SpiderPlus & Co.
summary: SpiderPlus & Co. engages in the development and sale of SPIDERPLUS, a drawing and site management application for the construction and maintenance industry in Japan. The company's solution enables site foreman in construction industry to organize drawings, manage photos, and output forms, as well as to perform various inspections. It also serves equipment and electric companies. The company was formerly known as Regolith, Inc. and changed its name to SpiderPlus & Co. in September 2020. SpiderPlus & Co. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
